content.en:
(There were errors in the previous chapter, which has been revised)

In the ten thousand years of time accelerated, Ye Tian was almost all cultivating the Nine Extremes True Technique, and the power of the True Ancestor was at least ten times stronger than at the beginning, but he was still in the early stage of the Great Dao, and had not yet stepped into the middle of the Great Dao.

But in terms of strength, Ye Tian is much stronger than at the beginning, and he is definitely not weaker than the Dragon Power Peak Lord.

In addition, Ye Tian's body was nearly one percent of the forbidden body under the continuous refining of the power of the dark taboo, and at this rate, if he cultivated for another million or millions of years, he would definitely be able to refine one of the forbidden bodies.

Yicheng's forbidden body is already a forbidden body, and the ability to exert the power of the forbidden will definitely skyrocket in combat power.

It can even be said that at that time, just relying on his forbidden body will be enough to ignore the attacks of the top true ancestors, and he can even initially resist the attacks of the supreme true ancestors.

Ye Tian was able to progress so fast in the forbidden body, naturally thanks to that forbidden black lotus, otherwise if he wanted to refine the forbidden body to one percent, he would not be able to do it at all, because he couldn't even practice, unless he was on the edge of the dark forbidden domain, slowly absorbing the forbidden power of those dark forbidden domains, but that power was even more violent than the power of the forbidden black lotus, and it took a long time to be able to refine a little.

With that kind of cultivation speed, don't even think about refining the forbidden body to one percent for trillions of years.

Ye Tian went out of the customs and learned about the situation in the outside world.

Unexpectedly, the outside world was very calm, and there was no situation where the True Ancestor kept fighting as he imagined.

But there was one thing that surprised Ye Tian, many forces in the Daoshan Realm had taken refuge in those Upper Triple Heaven forces in the Divine Heaven Realm and became their subordinate forces.

Of course, Ye Tian can also understand.

At the moment, there are many true ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm and they have an advantage, but when they understand the strength and heritage of the Upper Triple Heaven Force, they will not be optimistic about the strength of the Dao Mountain Realm.

After all, there was only one Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in the Dao Mountain Realm, and those Upper Triple Heaven forces in the Divine Heaven Realm had quite a few Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestors, Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and even Eight Heavenly Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Maybe those Upper Triple Heaven forces still have the Invincible Dao Ancestor of the Nine Heavens hidden!

Compared to those Upper Triple Heaven forces, a transcendent force like Dao Mountain was simply an ant.

Therefore, many forces can see the situation clearly, and naturally take refuge early, so as not to have a conflict between the two sides in the future, and they will become cannon fodder.

And the upper triple heaven forces are now only many strong people, but there are few bottoms, and there are no follow-up disciples to supplement, so they naturally need to open the mountain gate in the Dao Mountain realm, so they also need a lot of subsidiary forces, and they are naturally willing to accept them.

This is the general trend, and Ye Tian can also see it.

Not to mention tens of millions of years, even if it is ten trillion years, it is difficult for the Daoshan Realm to compete with a domain realm of the Divine Heaven Realm, or even a Upper Triple Heaven force of a domain realm.

After all, a strong man can suppress a weaker realm.

Therefore, the moment when the Ancient Realm became the Ancient Realm, or the day when those Dao Ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm recovered from their injuries and woke up one by one, the situation in the entire Dao Mountain Realm would inevitably undergo tremendous changes.

At that time, I am afraid that only forces like the Forbidden Temple had the ability to avoid it.

......

"The Void Heaven One Vein has given birth to 301 Dao Ancestors, this is good news!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But this is also the current limit of the Void Heaven One Vein, not that there are not enough Dao treasures, but that the number of True Ancestors at the extreme of the Great Dao is not enough, and the other True Ancestors are all in the early, middle and late stages of the Great Dao realm, and there is no way to impact the Dao Ancestor realm, they can only wait for their cultivation to be enough, and the other accumulations are enough, before they dare to impact the Dao Ancestor realm.

Otherwise, the foundation has not accumulated enough, and the impact has failed, which is enough to regret death!

Of course, with the strength of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor Quadruple Heaven Dao Ancestor, coupled with the fact that there are so many Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Vein, it is enough for the Void Heaven One Vein to plunder a large number of benefits in the chaos.

In fact, the Void Heaven Pulse is also doing this, and it is currently purging the enemy, destroying one force after another, breaking into one forbidden place after another, and forming a battle formation with a large number of Dao Ancestors, which is enough to sweep most of the forbidden lands.

With such an advantage, the Void Sky Pulse can naturally develop rapidly.

And the Void Heaven True Kingdom of the Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm has also grown rapidly under the leadership of Ye Tian, and many True Ancestors have been born so far, plus with Ye Tian's protection, no force dares to offend the Void Heaven True Country.

Ye Tian's only concern was that there were Divine Heaven Realm forces to deal with the Void Heaven True Kingdom, but at present, there was no such situation.

Obviously, everyone is watching the situation, and it is not yet time to fight.

......

Liulizong.

This sect is a five-fold heavenly force in the Divine Heaven Realm, and it is not weak among the middle three-fold heavenly forces.

Now, this sect has also been born, and it is constantly recruiting some geniuses from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

In fact, the geniuses of the Dao Mountain Realm are not bad, but they can't be cultivated well, and their combat effectiveness is much weaker than that of the geniuses of the Divine Heaven Realm.

But as long as you cultivate it carefully, you can definitely become a real strong.

In addition to recruiting geniuses, the Liuli Sect also recruited forces in the Daoshan Realm, but so far few forces have been willing to join the Liuli Sect.

Not why, it's just because the Liuli Sect is just a five-heaven force, and the strength of Daoshan is about the same.

Instead of taking refuge in the Liuli Sect, why not take refuge in those Sixfold Heaven forces or Sevenfold Heaven forces.

Besides, the Dao Ancestors have not yet been born, and the current strongest person in the Liuli Sect is only the True Ancestor.

But on this day, a true ancestor led a small group of true monarchs to the Liuli Sect and was willing to take refuge in the Liuli Sect.

One of the top True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect, Xuangang True Ancestor, personally received this True Ancestor named Huoyun.

"Meet Xuangang True Ancestor!"

Huoyun True Ancestor greeted Dao.

"You said you were from the Dark Temple?"

Fire Cloud True Ancestor asked.

"That's good!" the Fire Cloud True Ancestor nodded.

Xuangang True Ancestor pondered: "According to my information, the situation in the Dark God Temple is very bad now, and it is so chased by the Void Heaven that it does not dare to show its head, and even the Dark God True Kingdom of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has been destroyed, and the current center of gravity of our Liuli Sect is in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, you don't have any strength in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, you take refuge in our Liuli Sect, what good is our Liuli Sect?"

If there is no good, no force will do it.

The same is true for the Liuli Sect, if the Huoyun True Ancestor can't say a reason, the Xuangang True Ancestor won't accept the Dark God Temple.

"Since Xuangang True Ancestor knows about our Dark God Temple, he should also understand that our Dark God Temple belongs to a very special force in the Dao Mountain Realm, no one knows about our headquarters, and we almost don't recruit geniuses in the chaos, but our strength exceeds the average top forces, before the Void Sky Vein did not rise, the Void Sky First Vein was far from our opponent at all, so where did our genius come from?"

Fire Cloud True Ancestor said.

"Huh!" Xuangang True Ancestor exclaimed in surprise, he really hadn't thought about this question.

Indeed, without a source of genius, how can the power grow?

In this way, the Dark Temple really has secrets.

"Our Dark God Temple is willing to use this secret and send a large number of geniuses to the Glaze Sect, just ask the Glaze Sect to accept our Dark Shrine and destroy the Void Heaven Pulse by the way!"

He hated the Void Heaven Pulse very much, because the Dark God Temple had fallen many Dao Ancestors under the pursuit of the Void Heaven Ancestor, and there were currently less than ten Dao Ancestors left.

And the Dark God True Kingdom of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was directly destroyed, and some of his descendants and disciples were also in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and all of them fell because of this.

Therefore, he couldn't wait to destroy the Void Heaven Pulse.

But he knew very well that the Void Heaven Vein was now far beyond the Dark God Temple, and with the strength of the Dark God Temple, let alone destroy the Void Sky One Vein, if the headquarters was exposed, the Dark God Temple would be destroyed.

Therefore, the Dark Temple must seek protection.

They also thought about finding the Upper Triple Heaven Force, but the Upper Triple Heaven Force was too strong, and if they cooperated with them, they might not even have a chance to negotiate.

Moreover, the other party does not necessarily lack geniuses, after all, all geniuses will definitely join the Triple Heaven Force in the future.

Therefore, only by looking for the Triple Heaven Force could they hope to achieve cooperation, and they studied it for a long time and decided to find the Liuli Sect.

The Liuli Sect has no scruples about doing things, and it will really destroy the Void Heaven for the sake of profit, and in addition to the fact that the Liuli Sect does not have the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the overall strength is not much worse than the Sixfold Heaven Force.

And to kill the Void Heavenly Dao Ancestor, you don't need a six-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, any five-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is enough.

So, they found the Liuli Sect.
